header.subtitle: How sovereign is your tech stack? StackAtlas scores technologies and standards worldwide with a transparent sovereignty score from 0–100 – and reveals which dependencies threaten your digital independence.

footer.subtitle: Rate and compare tech stacks worldwide by digital sovereignty

news.title: Rating Reports & Community News
news.description: This page publishes all rating reports so the community can review the evaluation process transparently and improve it together.
news.pushHint: Whenever a new score is calculated, we publish an update here and can trigger targeted push notifications.

identityWalletInteroperability.title: Rating Report: Identity Wallet Interoperability
identityWalletInteroperability.summary: The community reviewed interfaces, open standards, and portability. Result: strong foundations, but standardized export formats still need improvement.

openDataGovernance.title: Rating Report: Open Data Governance
openDataGovernance.summary: The review focused on data usage, control mechanisms, and governance transparency. Result: clear progress through traceable role models.

publicCloudExitReadiness.title: Rating Report: Public Cloud Exit Readiness
publicCloudExitReadiness.summary: We assessed exit strategies, interoperability, and vendor lock-in risks. Result: first exit paths exist, but migration effort remains high.
